name: Dyadia

skills.name: Melodic Swing
skills.description:
Enhances her next Basic Attack periodically to swing toward the enemy, dealing damage and knocking them back, then jumping back.
When any hero receives Blessing of Fate or Bitter Reconciliation, she earns Gold and reduces the preparation time of her enhanced Basic Attack.

skills.name: Heartlink
skills.description:
Blesses a teammate and restores Health. When two blessed teammates come close, they recover Health and gain Movement Speed.
If she blesses an already blessed teammate, she will dash to them, and both recover Health and gain Movement Speed.
Can use this skill again within 5s.

skills.name: Bitter Farewell
skills.description:
Marks an enemy, exposes them and deals continuous damage. When two marked enemies come close, they stop taking damage.
If she uses the skill on a marked enemy, she will dash to them, immobilizing them and dealing continuous damage.
Can use this skill again within 5s.

skills.name: Destined Encounter
skills.description: Commands a swarm of wisps to fly forward, blessing and granting Health recovery to teammates, while marking and damaging enemies.

skillsZh.name: 吟行
skillsZh.description:
少司緣每隔一段時間強化下次普攻：盪鞦韆至敵人身前造成傷害和擊退，並向後跳躍。
當任意英雄受到「良緣賜福」或「冤緣化解」時，少司緣達成業績獲得金幣獎勵，並縮短強化普攻的準備時間。

skillsZh.name: 兩同心
skillsZh.description:
少司緣祝願友方「良緣」並回復生命值，兩名「良緣」英雄貼近時觸發「良緣賜福」再次回復高額生命值並加速。
對已有「良緣」的友方再次施放，會位移跟隨目標並進行「良緣賜福」，共同回復生命值並加速。
5秒內，少司緣可以再次施放本技能。

skillsZh.name: 怨離別
skillsZh.description:
少司緣警示敵方「冤緣」，持續造成顯形和傷害，兩名「冤緣」英雄貼近時可觸發「冤緣化解」停止傷害。
對已有「冤緣」的敵方再次施放，會朝目標位移並進行「冤緣化解」，造成定身和持續傷害。
5秒內，少司緣可以再次施放本技能。

skillsZh.name: 因緣際會
skillsZh.description: 少司緣指揮成群的緣崽向前擁簇飛行，對沿途友方英雄施加「良緣」和生命值回復，沿途敵人施加「冤緣」和傷害。

tips: Build: Succubus Cloak, Breakthrough Robe, Sage's Sanctuary.
tipsZh: 少司緣（遊走）：梯度 S，勝率 48.65%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：魔女斗篷、破繭之衣、賢者的庇護.

patchHistory.change: Camp HOK — WR 48.1%, pick 1.1%, ban 1.1%, tier S.
Strong into Dian Wei, Liu Bei, Musashi · Weak into Wukong, Musashi, Ying.

Dyadia is a Tier S staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Ban rate 1.1% — expect Dyadia to be removed in tryhard lobbies; have a backup in the same role. Below 49% global WR — high-rank players often avoid unless compensating for team comp.

faqs.question: Is Dyadia good in current season?
faqs.answer: Dyadia is Tier S Support with 48.65% win rate, 1.07% pick rate, and 0.98% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Dyadia build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Succubus Cloak, Breakthrough Robe, Sage's Sanctuary, Ardent Dominion, Amble - Winter, Ravage - Phantom.

faqs.question: How to counter Dyadia?
faqs.answer: Pick Wukong, Musashi, Ying. Strong into Dian Wei, Liu Bei, Musashi.

faqsZh.question: 少司緣 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 少司緣 為 S 梯度，勝率 48.65%、選取 1.07%、禁用 0.98%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 少司緣 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：魔女斗篷、破繭之衣、賢者的庇護、熾熱支配、徐行・凜冬、侵略・怒魂.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 少司緣？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Wukong、Musashi、Ying。少司緣 克制 Dian Wei、Liu Bei、Musashi。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Dian Wei, Liu Bei, Musashi. Weak into: Wukong, Musashi, Ying.

guide.overview: Dyadia is a Easy Support (Roaming) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S with 48.1% win rate and 1.1% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Dyadia: Enhances her next Basic Attack periodically to swing toward the enemy, dealing damage and knocking them back, then jumping back.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of the Arcane, Frozen Breath, Augur's Word, then complete Venomous Staff, Mask of Agony. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Fate for stats that match Dyadia's Support kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Heartlink → Bitter Farewell → Destined Encounter → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Destined Encounter (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Heartlink, and Destined Encounter on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Heartlink → Bitter Farewell → Destined Encounter → weave basic attacks

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Help marksman crash wave, then rotate mid for picks. Return before Tyrant if your carry has no escape.
guide.teamfight: Peel carry first, then look for pick on out-of-position enemies. Ward Tyrant 30s before spawn.
guide.highRank: Dyadia is a Tier S staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Ban rate 1.1% — expect Dyadia to be removed in tryhard lobbies; have a backup in the same role. Below 49% global WR — high-rank players often avoid unless compensating for team comp.
comparisons: Dyadia vs Dolia (Support, Tier S): Dolia is 1.8% pick / 46.1% WR. Dyadia has +2.0% WR vs Dolia in Camp data. Choose Dyadia when you need Roaming identity; choose Dolia for Roaming comfort.
Dyadia vs Cai Yan (Support, Tier S): Cai Yan is 1.3% pick / 50.3% WR. Cai Yan wins 2.2% more often globally. Choose Dyadia when you need Roaming identity; choose Cai Yan for Roaming comfort.

matchups.summary: Dyadia excels into Dian Wei, Liu Bei, Musashi. Avoid blind picking into Wukong, Musashi, Ying without team peel.
